title: Sensitive resist systems based on acid‐catalyzed polymer reactions
author_string: Ito, Hiroshi, England, William P., Ueda, Mitsuru
abstract: AbstractAcid‐catalyzed polymer reactions have been successfully utilized in the design of chemical amplification resist systems for semiconductor manufacturing. In this paper are described preparation and acid‐catalyzed depolymerization reactions of α‐substituted polystyrenes.
